name: Sunburst Ground Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can whole kernel corn, drained (16 oz.)
1 cup cubed pasteurized process cheese spread (4 oz.)
1 can refrigerated buttermilk or country-style biscuits (8 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large frying pan, brown the ground beef and onions until cooked through. Drain excess fat.
3. Add pepper, tomato sauce, beans, and cheese; simmer for about 5 minutes.
4. Separate biscuit dough into 10 biscuits. Cut a hole in the center of each biscuit to resemble a doughnut.
5. Pour the hot meat mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Dip the biscuit rings in melted butter and gently pull them slightly to form an oval shape.
7. Place the biscuit rings around the edge of the casserole.
8. Arrange the holes in the center and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the biscuits are golden brown.
Makes 4 to 5 servings.
